lore.story: The young girl who seeks to rebuild the Star Atlas in order to solve the secrets of the Stars.

skill.name: Star Trail
skill.description: <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> continuously slows nearby enemies by 20% and reveals their position.

skill.name: Astral Meteor
skill.description: Novaria summons an <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> at the target location, dealing 75<font color="62f8fe"> (+25% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.33s and applying a continuously increasing slow effect (up to 2.5 times the original). After 2s, the <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> explodes, dealing 260<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> (+ 4% target's Max HP) <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applying 2.5 times the slow effect.

skill.name: Astral Recall
skill.description:
Novaria summons an <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> at a distance and draws it towards herself. She gains 20% Movement Speed and can pass through terrain. Moving through terrain increases the Movement Speed boost to 60%.

Upon catching the <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font>, Novaria can launch the <font color="a6aafb">Star Shatter</font> in the target direction within 5s. The sphere will explode when hitting an enemy hero, dealing 230<font color="62f8fe"> (+90% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> plus 4% of the target's Max HP. The damage will increase based on the <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font>'s travel distance (during both draw and launch), up to 2.5 times the original damage.

skill.name: Astral Echo
skill.description: Novaria scatters <font color="a6aafb">Astral Echo</font> in the target direction, briefly slowing enemy heroes hit by 50% while applying <font color="a6aafb">Astral Ring</font> on them. It increases targets' hitbox by 2.5 times and reveals their position for 5s.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Novaria's Ultimate to gain vision of the battlefield, then summon an Astral Sphere with her 2nd Skill. After catching the Astral Sphere, launch it to damage the enemy and use her 1st Skill to thwart enemy heroes that try to get close.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, initiate by using Novaria's 2nd Skill to gain extra Movement Speed and summon an Astral Sphere. Then, slow the enemy with her 1st Skill and use her 2nd Skill again to launch the Astral Sphere to deal damage.
